title: centranthus ruber subsp. angustifolius
intro: Centranthus ruber subsp. angustifolius, also known as red valerian or centranthus, is a flowering plant species in the family Valerianaceae. This perennial herb is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The plant is rich in antioxidants, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds, providing health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and other conditions. Centranthus ruber subsp. angustifolius can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
